name: Ligo Ventures
notes: No firm named 'Ligo Ventures' found. The only match is 'Ligo Partners LLC', a Miami-based single-family office/VC co-investment platform. May be the same entity under a different name. Location set to Miami, FL based on that match.

name: M25
notes: Early-stage Midwest-focused VC fund founded in 2015. Headquartered at 415 N La Salle Dr, Chicago, IL 60654.

name: Mainstreet Advisors
notes: Main Street Advisors is a Santa Monica-based boutique investment and merchant banking firm founded in 1997, focused on media, entertainment, sports, and consumer sectors. Multiple similar-named firms exist; this is the best match for a VC/investment advisory context.

name: Manresa Ventures
notes: Early-stage VC firm founded in 2019, headquartered at 921 Front Street, San Francisco, CA 94105. Focuses on fintech, payments, and e-commerce software.

notes: Seed-stage VC firm founded in 2013, headquartered at 73 Spring Street, Suite 202, New York, NY 10012. Focuses on digital commerce, media, fintech, and digital health.

name: MVP Ventures
notes: Early-stage deep tech VC firm founded in 2020 by Andre de Baubigny and Weston Moyer. Headquartered at 1300 El Camino Real, Suite 100, Menlo Park, CA 94025. Focuses on AI and deep tech.

name: Next Legacy
notes: Investment firm (Next Legacy Partners) founded in 2018, headquartered at 180 Lytton Ave, Palo Alto, CA 94301. Democratizes access to VC for athletes, philanthropists, and changemakers.

name: Nextworld Evergreen
notes: Growth capital firm founded in 2016 headquartered at 836 Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA 94133. Focuses on consumer goods, clean beauty, food and beverage, sustainable lifestyle, and health/wellness.

name: Night Capital
notes: Boutique VC firm founded in 2019 by Kevin Carter (former SV Angel GP). Based in San Francisco, CA. Early-stage focus with 1,300+ investments including 30+ unicorns.

name: Nosara Capital
notes: Nosara Capital Management Limited is headquartered in London, UK (registered with Companies House). Invests in online marketplaces globally. HQ is not in the US.
